roa.docketEntryComment: /CAL: PRELIMINARY HEARING AND CRIMINAL PROTECTIVE ORDER/X: ALEX TUCHMAN APPEARS WITH ANTHONY MIZIKO FROM THE PUBLIC DEFENDER'S OFFICE/WITEXCL: DEFENSE/WIT SWORN: SERGEANT JOHN CUNNIE SFPD/EXHMA:  PPL 1 1PG DOCUMNET WITH PHOTOS OF HAT AND SUSPECT WITH REDACTED TEXT/EXHMA:  PPL 2 1PG DOCUMNET WITH PHOTOS OF TOOLS AND SHOE WITH REDACTED TEXT/EXHMA:  PPL 3 1PG DOCUMNET WITH PHOTOS SUSPECT AND SHOE WITH REDACTED TEXT/WIT SWORN:  LAB TECHNICIANCUI ZENG SFPD CRIME LAB/EXHMA:  PPL 4 4PG SUPPLEMENTAL LAB REPORT/871D: 1AND 2/DEFTCUST3/SHERCOM1/X:EXHIBITS MARKED AND ADMITTED INTO EVIDENCE, ARE ORDERED RETURNED/X:TO THE OFFERING PARTY PENDING FURTHER ORDER OF COURT
